docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARNER, CAROLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD $1,680.90 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,740.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $80.61 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $210.19 AS TO DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, CAROLE
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, CAROLE AS TO DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-01-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ***FEE FOR SERVICE: NOT STATED ON FORM*** SERVED MAR-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CAROLE WARNER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DONALD REINSTADLER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,049.95 FILED BY WARNER, CAROLE AS TO DEFENDANT REINSTADLER, DONALD DBA AMERICAN OVERHEAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
